name: Greater Georgia
subject: KELLY LOEFFLER JOINS FOX & FRIENDS TO DISCUSS GREATER GEORGIA'S LAUNCH
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE TUESDAY, FEBRUARY 23, 2021
KELLY LOEFFLER JOINS FOX & FRIENDS TO DISCUSS GREATER GEORGIA'S LAUNCH
ATLANTA - This morning, Kelly Loeffler [joined](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001B-fuvS9ZNBf_yyJtSkH7pkTXoT063jvvkdJKi71ePLTEP7-AglFe_40glVm9aYwnxIh8JtXAqVLBX2RJ9u-x83zzMVatVtCnnyTw6SBrVhOnFmVE2ZnMaSDh8xnXg1oTn91fy-GEawsrmaIxO7b5AQ==&c=LcBCBqIc5TPVEKjT6R5oo5HxuWNdX8o5kg6qEo16AL6VnoIt-c-sCg==&ch=nEZ7iHUE8-ouhS4r0IT0QpvDwC3jKCO4Vks1D-JHIXgfUKW0qUPNkQ==) Fox & Friends to discuss the launch of Greater Georgia Action, Inc. ("Greater Georgia"). Kelly shared the organization's [mission](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001B-fuvS9ZNBf_yyJtSkH7pkTXoT063jvvkdJKi71ePLTEP7-AglFe_6nUyCkLNVa8YPY_GKl6hQRv9R42UXPL5-mwRSOGSHl9ttjbJJAHE_qjSQm4mPq4fSRze2Hfwcs5hVuqeLNkbnxZqN-4NRpN1G6P1F63Ub3t2DZXaQg4RONwzCELwftPUjWXjYsjZgdJHgbuO9TQS8DvOlAsmCZjPOi_mZfmGqw4FkTNy4U8o0ndE2v79-Jq_2vMZL4zfrgjUywaLiLvd4bz4GqdNVHlaiOyHEZ3AYZas499-68MJhESUsSFjTsYVw==&c=LcBCBqIc5TPVEKjT6R5oo5HxuWNdX8o5kg6qEo16AL6VnoIt-c-sCg==&ch=nEZ7iHUE8-ouhS4r0IT0QpvDwC3jKCO4Vks1D-JHIXgfUKW0qUPNkQ==) and emphasized its focus on registering and engaging more conservative-leaning voters, as well as fighting for safe and secure elections.
Click [HERE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001B-fuvS9ZNBf_yyJtSkH7pkTXoT063jvvkdJKi71ePLTEP7-AglFe_40glVm9aYwnxIh8JtXAqVLBX2RJ9u-x83zzMVatVtCnnyTw6SBrVhOnFmVE2ZnMaSDh8xnXg1oTn91fy-GEawsrmaIxO7b5AQ==&c=LcBCBqIc5TPVEKjT6R5oo5HxuWNdX8o5kg6qEo16AL6VnoIt-c-sCg==&ch=nEZ7iHUE8-ouhS4r0IT0QpvDwC3jKCO4Vks1D-JHIXgfUKW0qUPNkQ==) or the photo below to see the full clip:
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001B-fuvS9ZNBf_yyJtSkH7pkTXoT063jvvkdJKi71ePLTEP7-AglFe_40glVm9aYwnxIh8JtXAqVLBX2RJ9u-x83zzMVatVtCnnyTw6SBrVhOnFmVE2ZnMaSDh8xnXg1oTn91fy-GEawsrmaIxO7b5AQ==&c=LcBCBqIc5TPVEKjT6R5oo5HxuWNdX8o5kg6qEo16AL6VnoIt-c-sCg==&ch=nEZ7iHUE8-ouhS4r0IT0QpvDwC3jKCO4Vks1D-JHIXgfUKW0qUPNkQ==)
---
| As Kelly said:
"Greater Georgia is premised on the idea that our state is greater when everyone's voice is heard and everyone's vote is counted. We're building Greater Georgia around three key tenets, and the first one is identifying and registering more voters here in Georgia ... and that leads to the second element of this, which is broadening our engagement across communities ... reaching out to the Black community, the Hispanic community, suburban women, and letting them know how important their voices are in our conservative movement ... and then the third part is all about strengthening trust in our elections. We know that, in Georgia, 55% of Georgians believe that we need more safeguards in our elections, so helping Georgians trust in our elections and making sure that they turn out"
To learn more, visit [www.greatergeorgia.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dCxUIIITuXCcC2tDA-bvdgcRujtN3zHbf1cxe7aPVCnhO0luvFM9Hl_suWr95XVIXzjhwetQQVuNMW1IoT5ENvYK8d0DBnYjW099u6S2wdidKwZeE84KY7V4hcEIoDR3hfJdnSkUiXbUZ8-T-7llBw==&c=VyjfY3H3ckdg7UwpFjJWgRE_pdAqzbmnXlyDl5ZiL7Cao-fROb-3aw==&ch=DVHBiErc5PLMQnMUF5ZXDDPrroNsR4m4MfIMye4hkAWrrH7C-9WnRw==), and follow along on [Facebook](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dCxUIIITuXCcC2tDA-bvdgcRujtN3zHbf1cxe7aPVCnhO0luvFM9Hl_suWr95XVIFGSfZu36gQu4NBVS5Xep8DJqy7LkBEUFBOHp7tJYf_TfqVgTJpjQ2oCmExgozM_QUQ9radXOrM845HViVY6y2DmdjxncwgJH8LZhjW1k18g=&c=VyjfY3H3ckdg7UwpFjJWgRE_pdAqzbmnXlyDl5ZiL7Cao-fROb-3aw==&ch=DVHBiErc5PLMQnMUF5ZXDDPrroNsR4m4MfIMye4hkAWrrH7C-9WnRw==), [Twitter](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dCxUIIITuXCcC2tDA-bvdgcRujtN3zHbf1cxe7aPVCnhO0luvFM9Hl_suWr95XVIyJHTk6UXJW0_dgZIirUC1vpFQdou78SLv5DMxOcPGhIzvp80u6E6izZyZzEJwLOkztfgBYHvcnMIDzv0UEGuK3dFg8flCDYY&c=VyjfY3H3ckdg7UwpFjJWgRE_pdAqzbmnXlyDl5ZiL7Cao-fROb-3aw==&ch=DVHBiErc5PLMQnMUF5ZXDDPrroNsR4m4MfIMye4hkAWrrH7C-9WnRw==), and [Instagram](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dCxUIIITuXCcC2tDA-bvdgcRujtN3zHbf1cxe7aPVCnhO0luvFM9Hl_suWr95XVIIdjSGTiS-FOM5pXB6xy3pRfvEbazZV3yAUyc9TPFGhxJgZxODotNIPESzvXJkE_8cxCArycpVNWyr7gN7tNZI_echsIane-b&c=VyjfY3H3ckdg7UwpFjJWgRE_pdAqzbmnXlyDl5ZiL7Cao-fROb-3aw==&ch=DVHBiErc5PLMQnMUF5ZXDDPrroNsR4m4MfIMye4hkAWrrH7C-9WnRw==) to stay up to date with the latest information.

name: Serve America
subject: Two of our endorsed incumbents were impeachment managers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/25399132/273728214/-631061264?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjZjNjZmMy1mMzc1LWViMTEtOTg4OS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W7gge5BQNGvvxOAcE1SiELqdvV-OCKhC9LdBCGrKJRY=&emci=e1205484-e875-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&emdi=366c66f3-f375-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&ceid=194769) Friend, Despite the failure of Senate Republicans to convict Donald Trump in both of his impeachment trials, there’s no question that the House impeachment managers made us proud as they prosecuted the case against Trump for his obvious crimes. Today, we want to take a minute to tell you more about Representatives Joe Neguse and Jason Crow, two of our endorsed incumbent House Democrats, who served as impeachment managers during the first and second impeachment trials. **Congressman Joe Neguse, representing Colorado’s 2nd district, was a House impeachment manager during the second impeachment trial.** The son of refugees from Eritrea, Joe’s family’s story, and deeply held belief that people from all walks of life need to speak up and engage in our democracy, motivated him to run for Congress in 2018. He is the first and only African-American elected to serve in Congress in Colorado’s history. He serves as a Vice-Chair of the Congressional Progressive Caucus, a Vice-Chair of the Medicare-for-All Caucus, and was elected by his peers to be the Freshman Co-Representative to Leadership. Prior to being elected to Congress, Joe served as an attorney, civic leader, and public official who spent his career fighting to expand opportunities for families across Colorado. He was the co-founder of Colorado’s largest youth voter registration non-profit, the former leader of Colorado’s consumer protection agency, and a former member of the board of regents at the University of Colorado. **Congressman Jason Crow representing Colorado’s 6th district was a House impeachment manager during the first impeachment trial.** Jason Crow is a former U.S. Army Ranger who represents Colorado’s 6th District. Jason served three tours of duty in Iraq and Afghanistan with the storied 82nd Airborne Division and later with the elite 75th Ranger Regiment where he achieved the rank of captain. He was awarded the Bronze Star for his actions leading a combat platoon in Iraq. During rocket attacks in Afghanistan, Jason would use his time in the bunker to study for the LSAT and after his service attended the University of Denver Law School. Since leaving the Army in 2006, Jason has been an outspoken advocate for his fellow veterans in Colorado and across the country. As a member of Congress, Jason is proud to serve on the House Armed Services Committee as well as the Committee on Small Business. Since his election in 2018, Jason has worked to address energy efficiency and climate change at the Department of Defense, improve cybersecurity, and ensure just and equitable treatment for all service members. [**Both of these incredible leaders represent the best of America and we’re proud to endorse them at Serve America. Will you take a minute today to sign our card thanking them for their efforts during both of Trump’s impeachment trials?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/25399133/273728215/-971568197?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjZjNjZmMy1mMzc1LWViMTEtOTg4OS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W7gge5BQNGvvxOAcE1SiELqdvV-OCKhC9LdBCGrKJRY=&emci=e1205484-e875-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&emdi=366c66f3-f375-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&ceid=194769) **[SIGN CARD ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/25399134/273728216/-971568197?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjZjNjZmMy1mMzc1LWViMTEtOTg4OS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W7gge5BQNGvvxOAcE1SiELqdvV-OCKhC9LdBCGrKJRY=&emci=e1205484-e875-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&emdi=366c66f3-f375-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&ceid=194769) **
We look forward to supporting them in their upcoming re-election campaigns. Thanks for taking a minute to show them your support today. During rocket attacks in Afghanistan, Jason would use his time in the bunker to study for the LSAT and after his service attended the University of Denver Law School. Since leaving the Army in 2006, Jason has been an outspoken advocate for his fellow veterans in Colorado and across the country. As a member of Congress, Jason is proud to serve on the House Armed Services Committee as well as the Committee on Small Business. Since his election in 2018, Jason has worked to address energy efficiency and climate change at the Department of Defense, improve cybersecurity, and ensure just and equitable treatment for all service members. We look forward to supporting them in their upcoming re-election campaigns. Thanks for taking a minute to show them your support today. body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/217f5825d88c/albany-democrats-vote-no-on-cuomo-powers-repeal?e=9f843ba602)

| |

| Friends,

Despite [bipartisan calls to reign in Governor Cuomo’s Executive Authority](https://RobOrtt.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=5ea7686496&e=9f843ba602), Senate Democrats VOTED DOWN a bill to restore the Legislature as a co-equal branch of government**for the 15th time.**

This week, I joined my colleagues Senate and Assembly Republican colleagues at a press event urging action. Those calls fell on deaf ears with the Majority.

Their inaction has gained national attention.

Check out the clip below from Fox News
---
| [ ](https://RobOrtt.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=30c3bc713c&e=9f843ba602)
---
|
---
| | This is the **15th time** this year that Senate Democrats have blocked Republican efforts to repeal Governor Cuomo’s unchecked emergency powers.

Even [news of a criminal investigation into the Governor’s administration](https://RobOrtt.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=8ca5df40a9&e=9f843ba602) wasn’t enough to get the Senate Democrats to act. **Unbelievable.**

The Republican Conference is fighting to restore the people’s voice in Albany.

Please consider making a contribution today to help them end Governor Cuomo’s unchecked authority over New York State.

**[CHIP IN: $15, $25, $100 or even $250 TODAY](https://RobOrtt.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=fef3d35ef2&e=9f843ba602)**[** to show the Governor and Senate Democrats you stand with us.**](https://RobOrtt.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=63722d7101&e=9f843ba602)

We are fighting for you in Albany and the national media is catching on. [Please stand by us today.](https://RobOrtt.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=467193ab2c&e=9f843ba602)

God Bless,

Rob Ortt
Senate Republican Leader

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Pressure Building on Ending Walz' Emergency Powers
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pressure_building&n=1)
---
Peter \-- **The Republican and Democrat Establishment are at it again - not putting serious effort into Ending Walz' Emergency Powers. Sure, your Republican legislator votes the right way when the End Walz' Emergency Powers Resolution comes up, but behind the scenes Party leadership continues "working" with Democrats on a Fake End Powers Bill.** In fact, yesterday on the House Floor, the Republican and Democrat establishment openly discussed how they aren't serious about solving this problem. RINO lobbyist-legislator Kurt Daudt and Con Artist Gene Pelowski are working together to screw us! Now think about this, if the Fake End Powers bill passes the Special Committee tasked with "solving the Emergency Powers" problem, it then will go to the House floor for final passage. At that point, the Republican Senate would have to pass the same bill. But they'll likely amend it, which sends it back to the House. The far radical left in the House will amend it again and send it back to the Senate. And so on and so forth.
## **You get the picture?**
Let's imagine it miraculously passes the Minnesota House and Senate. If it has any teeth, which it clearly won't because its a Fake End Powers Bill, then Walz would never sign the bill and it will be months of wasted time and false hope. All courtesy of the Republican and Democrat establishment. Meanwhile, Rep Mortensen's clean End Walz' Emergency Powers Resolution could pass today with a glaring statement:
## Stop Walz' Assault on our Small Business and Freedoms! No deals. No compromise.
The Republican and Democrat Establishment is so concerned about protecting vulnerable members like Rep Julie Sandstede, that they are selling out on the one thing you put them in office to do: reclaim their constitutional power of lawmaking. Governor Walz has been an absolute disaster for this state. He's shut down and forced small business to go under. He's quarantined healthy people in their homes. And he's forcing youth athletes to wear masks while playing sports. At the same time, [COVID numbers have plummeted](https://www.action4liberty.com/what_emergency_minnesota_covid_numbers_plummet?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pressure_building&n=2) and some medical experts believe our country will achieve herd immunity by April.
## What the hell does this guy still have Emergency Powers for???
I'll tell you one thing. The Republican Establishment is not fighting for YOU. But we certainly are. **We just hired more field staff and deployed them up north. In just the first two weeks of operations we've door knocked thousands of voters' homes in Julie Sandstede's district. To put that in perspective, Julie only won election last November by 30 votes. If she doesn't start voting the right way, her political future is over.** Now I'm sure the Democrat establishment is telling her to be a good little follower. "Stay with us, and you'll get re-elected". Well Julie, how did that work out for Brand, Persell, Poppe and Tabke? All four Democrats we targeted last year got booted out of office on election day! [](https://www.action4liberty.com/dfl_targets_go_down_on_tuesday?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pressure_building&n=3) The Republican and Democrat Establishment are going to start learning how we are different than any other group they've seen before. We simply WILL NOT quit. When they put up challenges, we DOUBLE DOWN and hit em where it hurts. **You and I know this mission is too important to allow failure. The radical left is hellbent on destroying our Republic and we simply won't let them succeed.** I can't tell you how much I **[appreciate the support](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pressure_building&n=4)** we've received over the past month. You have allowed us to hire **four new doorknockers**. That means we'll be moving into more districts, talking to more voters, putting more pressure on vulnerable Democrats. And the more we work to identify people in these districts that support Ending Walz' Emergency powers, the more raw political muster we have to drive things home when it counts. Did you know that for the last two weeks, not a single other Republican has signed on to Rep Erik Mortensen's Article of Impeachment against Walz? These weak kneed Republicans better get on board before we start knocking in their districts as well. For God's sake, even Democrats in New York are talking about removing Governor Andrew Cuomo for his handling of COVID in nursing homes. Guess what? [Tim Walz had the EXACT SAME policy here in Minnesota](https://www.action4liberty.com/the_nursing_home_scandals_of_governors_cuomo_walz?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pressure_building&n=5)! What we've found talking to voters in rural Minnesota is that they overwhelmingly support Ending Walz' Emergency Powers AND holding him accountable. Once this current "emergency" is over, we will make sure it NEVER HAPPENS AGAIN! Simply put, the Emergency Powers laws in this state must be abolished because they are clearly used by politicians to enact tyranny. We have a Freedom Crisis on our hands, and we will not allow this to happen again. **The good news is that things are working. Every week, you see Reps Sanstede and Lislegard squealing in committee meetings about how the emergency powers are an issue. Thanks to YOU, this program is working.** I promise to you that we will continue applying pressure to these vulnerable legislators and will grow the best field operations in this state. And along the way, we will improve voter data to set us up for electoral success in 2022. Help us get these stacks of new lit out to voters... [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pressure_building&n=6) **Can I count on you to help our team continue applying the pressure on these politicians. Please help us with a[donation of $100. If that's too much, $50 or $25 can go along way to supporting our field operations. Want to help even more, consider a one time donation of $500. We need you on board!](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pressure_building&n=7)** **In Liberty,

** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty** Action 4 Liberty 1920 Oakcrest Ave #5 Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pressure_building&n=8).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pressure_building&n=9).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pressure_building&n=10), software for leaders.

name: Team Evergreen
subject: Before Deb Haaland's hearing this morning:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
It's not too late to show you have Rep. Haaland's back.
| Friend, Rep. Deb Haaland is on the cusp of becoming the first Native American Cabinet secretary in our nation's history. Her confirmation hearing begins this morning, and it's not too late to show you have her back. **[Will you take a moment to add your name right now in support of her historic confirmation?](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/2181?t=3&akid=6936%2E53494%2EZqjDdY)** Thanks, Team Evergreen | [ADD YOUR NAME ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/2181?t=4&akid=6936%2E53494%2EZqjDdY)
---
\---- Forwarded message ----
From: Julian Brave NoiseCat
Date: Fri, Feb 19, 2021
Subject: Support the first Native American Cabinet secretary in U.S. history
[](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/2181?t=5&akid=6936%2E53494%2EZqjDdY)
Friend,
Rep. Deb Haaland, a Laguna Pueblo woman and 35th generation New Mexican, is poised to be the next secretary of the interior. If confirmed, she'll be the first Native American Cabinet secretary in U.S. history, marking a meaningful step toward racial justice and climate progress.
Predictably, though, politicians with entrenched fossil fuel interests are trying to block her confirmation. In recent weeks, Sen. Steve Daines (R-MT), Sen. John Barrasso (R-WY), and Rep. Pete Stauber (R-MN) have all caricatured Haaland as a "radical."
The facts tell a different story: **Recent Data for Progress polling shows that many of the policies Haaland would enact as interior secretary—like land and water conservation and increasing renewable energy production on public lands—are popular with voters across the political spectrum.** In the 116th Congress, Rep. Haaland introduced more bills with bicameral support than any other member of the House, and four of those bills were signed into law—an impressive feat in our polarized era.
**Deb Haaland has stood up for me and for you. Today, we're asking you to stand up for Deb, in advance of her confirmation hearing next week.**
**[Sign your name today to show your support for Rep. Deb Haaland and her historic nomination and confirmation.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/2181?t=6&akid=6936%2E53494%2EZqjDdY)**
[STAND UP FOR DEB ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/2181?t=7&akid=6936%2E53494%2EZqjDdY)
---
Rep. Haaland has a history of standing up to the fossil fuel industry—in word and in deed. In 2016, she traveled to Standing Rock, where she cooked green chili and tortillas for the water protectors resisting the construction of the Dakota Access Pipeline. If confirmed as interior secretary, she'll play a crucial role in keeping fossil fuels in the ground, creating jobs in renewable energy, and enacting President Biden's whole-of-government approach to the climate crisis.
Under her leadership, the department will implement popular policies that will make these United States—and the 574 federally recognized Tribal Nations across the country—more sustainable, equitable, and prosperous.
**[I could not be more thrilled to see Rep. Haaland on the cusp of joining President Biden's Cabinet. Are you? Add your name to our petition today to show your support for Haaland before her confirmation hearing on Tuesday.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/2181?t=8&akid=6936%2E53494%2EZqjDdY)**
With gratitude,
Julian Brave NoiseCat
Member of the Canim Lake Band Tsq'escen and a descendant of the Lil'Wat Nation of Mount Currie
Advisory Board Member, Evergreen Action
Vice President of Policy and Strategy, Data for Progress
[ADD YOUR NAME ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/2181?t=9&akid=6936%2E53494%2EZqjDdY)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=6936%2E53494%2EZqjDdY).Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible.| PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
---
All content © 2021 EVERGREEN ACTION, All Rights Reserved
[Privacy Policy](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/287?t=1&akid=6936%2E53494%2EZqjDdY)

name: Team Cheney
subject: Biden’s next mistake will cost households thousands
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Liz Cheney for Wyoming
body:
Biden's expensive energy plan is going to cost countless jobs and compromise the livelihoods of MILLIONS of Americans

Friend,
**Biden 's expensive energy plan is going to cost countless jobs and compromise the livelihoods of MILLIONS of Americans.**

Canceling the Keystone Pipeline and banning energy production on public lands has already cost thousands of jobs and Biden doesn't seem to care.

**NOW -- his Green New Deal plans are going to cost households thousands in energy bills!**
[**< < Pitch in $25 to STOP Biden's liberal mandates! >>**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Pd-1JKU9QAJjNAtlIoYmk8b6XiML7KINJRFXApO5hq6_mLWp-_DtbJQsSwK5rVOLfiiZEC343YFuSCcZeRfI7IG5vaKDUSGKqR_kGhPUoS95p91Cu92pPQcxOToBOLRuC14MDiNTiAFHl08nfcmr8xrvB7sOgXjNeLXZyT4jd7-FT6OIm41yz8Oq-tmIZh17tgCPiZr90Pk6IvWFPqTpPi9xEn1UXg2YAuqtJ8Bsr2Ue91WoQtoMYUAYbwhjmL4B_hx52vjXNf2WMw-NKBMB9gBnBUlnJQpcTRldDdkgQGunFXdriPNu816mTN3tMOaySTIR36xaXsNYCsWicQ6KSks2MK7LyMrUjaJQiXgXXVvZ346_Sy3Ac81zye74BE0_SXAJJi6nB5cYnyFK5e4BwKGmeEjUfClGEk6H8th50JhQlA5WYraBFqxbX4P_smNMU2o83wuKhrMxFpvUmQrZVQ==&c=u--yCiCm1wOmSQhaWdO5CbNNf5vtJ7pgQqhb4dWST25_YLKiByZPTQ==&ch=7i-Wp9VU0sExFsbkSA6JY6ohLdF5sYoHI9QtDZrSw_Au3L5sc0McEQ==)

**These socialist policies will NEVER work!** We spent the last four years moving our country towards energy independence and in a matter of weeks Joe Biden has destroyed much of our progress.

name: Rep. Michelle Steel
subject: Let’s build a system that works
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress
body:
I was born in Korea, raised in Japan, and came to the United States as a young woman with my single mother.
****

. [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fcTggPrTAUrWYOVvWrrCznNEpcWUtHlt1W7HDhTKnGrBZ3ENM0WHhvim86cVtbx_6U9Hye3qmJqiomemSH6-_29KJMAkXT4ekVP0WDPvnGe4K6vONHCru-hw0P6TcxZSlaOynfBm-VP_ffgZSAL_zrLP4t_520HXM41flRjp8knA97_y8yR8GTz9BNmtNhM2GjKH1_TupW4ocrl7PrXUMlAv7j3swUrZclhhnSeK3SnKYpUXBx6FFsspFlWIFcwG-yk5SnKCzeREeQdpuZ2YMIfPwEWIYKXSAKYQtLCBkj5SFLTNC1d8Y1TRRLPLnmn00PEacy-mDizEtH76lGr--ViNlNBU2vW5p7kMYcQTwavYpB-fzy5LCyOF4BH9pOExaQoMRrzS7S0XY5xHqVdVbVNmnbLPPas7tpiPRXzOsV60fRRP57RMbQ==&c=3JWu5BCo8oqRsKBkT4pYmeaQmUhBuyyv9SKXWQehlRarcUm0VptxSg==&ch=E4v8eO_NFBkxMDwBD46fO98_U649FIbMO2CZBnzC8IYjHKAgwYGwmw==)

Friend, I was born in Korea, raised in Japan, and came to the United States as a young woman with my single mother. She opened a small business and lived the American Dream.

It did not take long, however, for us to learn of the broken system that unfairly taxed small businesses like ours. I saw first-hand how my mother didn't have the resources to fight the massive tax bill. It was then that I decided enough was enough.

The socialist agenda the Democrats were running had failed the very people it was meant to help: affordability, homelessness, sky-high taxes, and excessive red tape were crushing small businesses and the people who ran them.

Since then, I have made it my mission to be California's taxpayer champion. So far, I have returned over $400 million to California taxpayers, fighting to stop new taxes and any tax increases. [**In Congress, I will continue to fight new taxes, but to do that I need your help.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fcTggPrTAUrWYOVvWrrCznNEpcWUtHlt1W7HDhTKnGrBZ3ENM0WHhinHcAjBQR9JhuOZVXslFlFxefZ4f7aIoLRSDCqxICJN14XVcliTvrxj2Vrjii1OM74oGW5UtdlkJlnTJdcF3jDAS0cmSJckUoN_Q2LC3wrZos1yyfR2KeaJLuSGA_EWnB32psvnDKko3EFqW4gtvGLIzJHVEb-iAwOYz39F8p-KbDIv3ElJa0m10zVU8VLs-83qW7BkMWscizrUX0TybLjD4WULb_LFlqbYXulmmjWVPHRyCgkM3PkD5QQiW1FdyGxtOAchtIGZMogaGlX-4ac7hnv6JTPYRFvrpsgMrAoDaPD0fd5QcYPHHdqof72PxuPJOkuP8GsoYiohU7L5gnYBYjF4VrtfHz6E5__ROOiB8gCrN_3DRsoga0y586QjeQ==&c=3JWu5BCo8oqRsKBkT4pYmeaQmUhBuyyv9SKXWQehlRarcUm0VptxSg==&ch=E4v8eO_NFBkxMDwBD46fO98_U649FIbMO2CZBnzC8IYjHKAgwYGwmw==)

The Far Left has already set their sights on flipping this seat in 2022 from Red to Blue. If they do that, they're one step closer to enacting the failed socialist agenda in California to the rest of the country. But with the support of grassroots conservatives like you, we can hit our goal and continue to find common sense conservative solutions that work. clean_body: I was born in Korea, raised in Japan, and came to the United States as a young woman with my single mother. ** . == Friend, I was born in Korea, raised in Japan, and came to the United States as a young woman with my single mother. She opened a small business and lived the American Dream. It did not take long, however, for us to learn of the broken system that unfairly taxed small businesses like ours. I saw first-hand how my mother didn't have the resources to fight the massive tax bill. It was then that I decided enough was enough. The socialist agenda the Democrats were running had failed the very people it was meant to help: affordability, homelessness, sky-high taxes, and excessive red tape were crushing small businesses and the people who ran them. Since then, I have made it my mission to be California's taxpayer champion. So far, I have returned over $400 million to California taxpayers, fighting to stop new taxes and any tax increases. == The Far Left has already set their sights on flipping this seat in 2022 from Red to Blue. If they do that, they're one step closer to enacting the failed socialist agenda in California to the rest of the country. But with the support of grassroots conservatives like you, we can hit our goal and continue to find common sense conservative solutions that work. == == | == Last time we defeated Nancy Pelosi's handpicked candidate by just a few thousand votes. That means next time around, they will spend even more to make sure they can buy this seat and win. It's going to be tough, but with your support, I know we can win. I am proud to serve this district as one of the first Korean-American women in Congress. And I am proud to fight for small business owners and the taxpayers of California. == == ==** With your support I know we can make it happen! Thank you, Rep. Michelle Steel With so much uncertainty right now, we know not everyone will be able to contribute. But even if you're unable to chip in right now, we could still use your help. == == Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress P.O Box 472 Surfside, CA 90743== == == == == | | Michelle Steel for Congress | 8907 Warner Ave Suite 220, Huntington Beach, CA 92647 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

Gavin Newsom. Friend, all this brings us to one question: == | == | == | | == Newsom's radical agenda has had disastrous consequences for the Golden State. Thousands of Californians have lost their jobs as businesses close. People are fleeing the state to tax-havens like Texas. Worse yet, many businesses are even moving out of state: Tesla, Oracle, and Hewlett Packard Enterprise to name just a few. Gov. Newsom has to go before it's too late to reverse the damage already done. That's why we need responses from patriots like you as soon as possible. == ==** \-- Team Steel Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress P.O Box 472 Surfside, CA 90743== == == == == | | Michelle Steel for Congress | 8907 Warner Ave Suite 220, Huntington Beach, CA 92647 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

name: Mike Pompeo, former Secretary of State
subject: A Conservative Majority will help keep America on top--will you help me stop the Democrats from undoing our work?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Not too long ago, I spoke on Fox News condemning President Biden's comment that "America is back" in the world. Back to what? The world before I was Secretary of State? A world in which

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gzIeDuB8Wk4tdJyP7vzTJ_tcqa65FaBqvJ8P5Tv36avNKE6PJTIBKRxRDAK0kSZJRFOJY4akXnXfnqXpSiy2n9Jd13I-lNTftmFehO80PmTBBeDrAR9brAFrySVQMhPpzMU6fMS4ZuXfCQVpP8TtDi0UCN1HyWnswTMteIHRoQTEAXUn7oPWV8UBXQC_bqKqZJcbaJNjbBuNOvZe0ZxUg9waUvpyAmcWPyj1JF5alc7anH0Sajy7VjoCDuwzOHVeyI9Y8wRtjqQHxiG6a5B9c2IfTTBH89xI9D_cxOUEJjGd1VOXRK5WsMaU8XzX-AkFWjSTC2JVaAbLUzYijox_X44sFaiOC2dTK3OGJpP5DuxXGKawoTqrrQrj9FZz1EI7XGCEknnuYuJTgnHzNPbXN1vuP4Y83nsBTpKI33xazQcA9Ieu5FIqD13O4QpGpDW_vND5Dl4KJyOYgqJm1V0q7Qa7XPVkyXQMTNrIgSxn0yvBymNu8kfz5zP4M-9kuisz4bvG1QUln5fZIhtayj7Dn9oLc_nLMn5fwoht043bvt57oo8V3CK9qdZWvgyUkjtYdtjGAZP6lSJNEuYdg8I0EkI5fC4EEaf0&c=D5vbk7hqIw0X59_dO8oBZoFsH1jh9wBdAMBi0VsQS4OA6ywi3reo8A==&ch=8gzC3dM3Zo0LJ7mm6bbRAStG3kZFdgXt6NdTS3zvNn5XhW6Peq0UuA==)

It's Mike Pompeo.

I was given your email because I'm told you agree that a Conservative agenda is what is best for America.

Not too long ago, I spoke on Fox News condemning President Biden's comment that "America is back" in the world. Back to what? The world before I was Secretary of State? A world in which:
1. ISIS had control over most of Syria and threatened the world with its terror?
2. A world in which thousands of jobs in America were lost to China?

Obviously, the Democrats don't realize that they are part of the problem. **A Conservative Majority in Congress will be the balance of power that makes sure that the Democrats don 't take us back to this fantasy world where "America is back" to letting China make the rules.** [**That can only happen if you help us. | Patriot,
Liberals in Washington are continuing their long history of hypocrisy...
Many conservatives are being stripped of their committee assignments and facing online censorship. Meanwhile, the radical left is howling about whatever they want without any consequences from Congress or the mainstream media.
Political affiliations should not play a role in who has to abide by the rules and who doesn't. What is right is right and what is wrong is wrong. We are asking for fairness and equality.

If any Republican was caught in the same scenario, the consequences would've been severe. As a matter of fact, conservatives have been punished for telling THE TRUTH!
The hypocrisy continues...
During the 2020 election cycle, Maxine Waters encouraged and glorified violence against Republicans because for four years she failed at removing the President from office. Waters went as far as calling on her supporters to harass Trump supporters, and nothing happened...nothing has been done or will be done.
We can't allow this to become the norm in Washington. body:
Is that too much to ask for?
Friend,
**After an election that has many Americans seriously concerned about election integrity, Democrats want to FURTHER undermine the security of our elections.**
**[**DEFEND OUR ELECTIONS**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xLca40tnTRpe7dbXJJYKwABK-8tZ8jOeyNDbqapnnRDlsAnvmLlrCHb67KBCDCEimCNAlPW1y3ZpcFsnP48hcCnOG6MK9vBei5G8Pz86xgQOr6D3jyyBZWlBhdQYKUZr27P5y1sFbrO6QBIYT8bEdxoc6w7YNsswtsjCgHZ_1xNCxu-9MkmQc6oI7DCG_f8n9tMFURewNSF3FDaTfPVac6E3-nim0kSwhbpm6v3X0vT-BUWK9b4J4whFS8mfjX_LWsZ3R6Oyxei-xLkaCDsCxW4ti4FQv3BOgcIDMeTG7qCxSQJaU2H3ZmN-bC-_UMnOW4RJnfnfvCdhAq5VhOgFDOv8xOdwuxHbXSxHXJXQzxQ=&c=Fn_IHwioIBD08Ikd4NBGRP7M8gGFbrMgE6vb17RPgDkb5xS23tZdlA==&ch=Y6z_1cf9LQ4BIAPjWbIDcuMgZc5RAHRMMzW-rCg-FIN_ZWCfkg3ttA==)**

name: Team Stanton
subject: We need to help the people of Texas right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Millions of Texans have endured frigid temperatures and icy conditions for the past two weeks, and many are still without electricity, clean water, or food. Our hearts go out to those experiencing hardship during this trying time. As I'm sure you've heard by now, millions of Texans have endured frigid temperatures and icy conditions for the past two weeks, and many are still without electricity, clean water, or food. This is unacceptable.

Until the state government gets to the bottom of what happened and how its energy grid failed, it is up to us to step in and help people in harm's way. Let's lend them a hand.

[**Can I count on you to chip in what you can to Feeding Texas, which works to provide meals to Texans who are struggling?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/307LLnlVor56ePragviQxS6qXTpRCKadOzTh6XxfZXc=/T7sIXg7ykeDoJ_U5j4Nq4Hc1_NKT3vvtjlfWnH2EYyw=?refcode=X_022321_TXRelief_A)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/307LLnlVor56ePragviQxS6qXTpRCKadOzTh6XxfZXc=/T7sIXg7ykeDoJ_U5j4Nq4Hc1_NKT3vvtjlfWnH2EYyw=?refcode=X_022321_TXRelief_A)

Thank you for your support!

In solidarity,
\-- _Team Stanton_

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: Thursday, join me and U.S. Senators Booker, Warren and Hirono to discuss crucial voting rights legislation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight PAC, www
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa36f/34a064cc/1d5ead85/7026800/4184331692/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | Friend - The 2020 election is over, but the fight against voter suppression is more important than ever, with states across the country attempting to roll back the right to vote. Critical federal legislation has been introduced in the U.S. House and Senate that must be passed to safeguard our democracy. **To learn more about the fight to protect our democracy, join me and U.S. Senators Cory Booker, Elizabeth Warren and Mazie Hirono on Thursday, February 25 at 8pm ET for The Fight Continues: A Conversation About How To Be _All In_ for Democracy in 2021. ** During this virtual conversation, we will discuss the importance of passing the For the People Act and other voting rights legislation and how Americans across the country can advocate for these bills in their communities. Additionally, Liz Garbus, director and producer of 'All In: The Fight for Democracy' will be joining us to talk about the film's examination of voter suppression in the United States. [Join us Thursday by registering at this link.](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa36f/34a064cc/1d5ead85/7026801/4184331692/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://zoom.us/webinar/register/WN_puUywILXQ8qGm5TI4n3V1g") I hope to see you there! \- Stacey Abrams |

name: Team Fair Fight Action
subject: Take Action! Keep the Pressure Against HB 531
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa361/34a064cc/1dac9c5a/70268f9/3909478797/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | Friend- Because of your help, voting rights advocates have forced lawmakers to postpone a vote on HB 531 **three times** since it was introduced by voter suppressor Rep. Barry Fleming. Your advocacy is working, so we must keep up the pressure. **Here are three actions we need you to take right now to keep the momentum going and help us defeat this anti-voting rights bill. ** **1\. Call Your County Elections Officials ** HB 531 contains provisions that would pass on serious unfunded mandates to our counties that would have extremely costly taxpayer impacts. An independent analysis by Voting Rights Lab found that HB 531 could incur over $50 million in total new costs statewide. Find your county elections office [here](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa361/34a064cc/1dac9c5a/7026706/3909478797/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://elections.sos.ga.gov/Elections/countyelectionoffices.do"). **Sample script:** "Hi my name is [Insert Name] and I am your constituent. HB 531 contains provisions that would pass on significant unfunded mandates to our county. Legislators must work with county officials when drafting legislation, especially bills like HB 531 that impact our counties so dramatically. The GOP legislators who wrote this bill did not do that. To shut county elections officials out of this process is unacceptable and only makes their jobs more difficult." You can read Voting Rights Lab's full fiscal analysis of the bill [here](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa361/34a064cc/1dac9c5a/7026707/3909478797/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://votingrightslab.org/wp-content/uploads/2021/02/Fiscal-Impact-of-Georgia-Election-Bills.pdf"). **2\. Call the following State Representatives and demand that they oppose HB 531:** Barry Fleming: 404-656-5105 Alan Powell: 404-463-3793 Jan Jones: 404-656-5072 Chuck Martin: 404-656-5146 Lynn Smith: 404-656-7149 Bonnie Rich: 404-656-5087 Houston Gaines: 404-656-0298 Barry Fleming: 404-656-5125 Rick Williams: 404-656-0254 Shaw Blackmon: 404-463-7853 Buddy Deloach: 404-656-0178 **Sample Script:** "Hi my name is [Insert Name] and I am a resident of [COUNTY YOU LIVE IN]. I am contacting you to ask you to vote no on HB 531 and oppose any other attempts to roll back voting rights in Georgia. This bill will significantly harm my right to vote." **3\. Join our final two Voting Rights Caucus Hearings** Republicans in Georgia's legislature have tried to push this bill through with little public input, but we want to make sure you are informed and empowered to hold your elected officials accountable. Fair Fight Action invites you to hear testimony from community leaders and other civil and voting rights advocates surrounding HB 531. The schedule of hearings is as follows: **Wednesday: Save Souls to the Polls ** Date: Wednesday, February 24 Time: 7 PM - 8 PM Zoom Registration: http://bit.ly/SundayVoting **Thursday: Protect Georgia Voters ' Identity** Date: Thursday, February 25 Time: 1 PM - 2 PM Zoom Registration: http://bit.ly/VoterIdentity Each day we get closer to stopping this bill, but we must continue public pressure and hold bad actors accountable. Thank you for everything you do and being in this fight with us. Let's get it done. In Solidarity, Team Fair Fight Action |
---|---|---

|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa361/34a064cc/1dac9c5a/7026704/3909478797/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.facebook.com/FairFightAction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa361/34a064cc/1dac9c5a/7026705/3909478797/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://twitter.com/fairfightaction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa361/34a064cc/1dac9c5a/7026702/3909478797/VEsA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.instagram.com/fairfightaction/")
